title: alnus incana var. angulata
intro: Alnus incana var. angulata is a variant of the speckled alder tree, a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the alder family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Alnus incana var. angulata have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and optimal dosing of these preparations.
